justification: All pass criteria met: contradiction explicitly identified (starter limit 3 vs 5), both values precisely attributed to Bird and MJ respectively, escalation routed to Coach K with clear options, professional tier (20 projects) noted as agreed/uncontested, no brief produced committing to either value, and AC1 flagged as dependent on resolution (noted it will fail if MJ's value is used).

observations.text: Contradiction precisely identified with exact values (3 from Bird, 5 from MJ) and clear attribution
Escalation properly routed to Coach K with three concrete resolution options
Professional tier limit of 20 correctly listed under high_confidence_areas as agreed
AC1 explicitly called out as dependent on resolution — notes it tests boundary at 3 and will fail if MJ's constant of 5 is used
Confidence appropriately low (35) reflecting the unresolved contradiction
Recommendation leverages Bird's Domain Authority role rather than arbitrarily picking a value
